content: Hi, I'm looking to renovate my apartment in Lisbon. I want to make it more modern and comfortable. I've been working from home a lot lately and I need a space that can help me stay focused.
That sounds like a great idea. What's your current setup like? Do you have any specific needs or preferences for your apartment?

I've got a small living room with a desk and a couch. But I want to add some more storage and maybe a comfortable reading nook. I've been getting into origami lately and I want a space where I can work on my projects.
Origami can be a great way to relax. For storage, you might want to consider using a modular shelving system. And for the reading nook, you could use a comfortable chair and a floor lamp.

That sounds great. I've also been thinking about adding some plants to the space. I've heard they can help purify the air and improve focus. My colleague, Sofia, has a great garden in her backyard and she's given me some tips.

Plants can be a great addition to a home. Some low-maintenance options might include snake plants or spider plants. And if you're looking to improve focus, you might want to consider using a standing desk or a mindfulness app.

I've been thinking about getting a standing desk. I've heard they can be really beneficial for productivity. I've also been trying to get into woodworking and I want a space where I can work on my projects.
Woodworking can be a great hobby. For a standing desk, you might want to consider using a converter or a sit-stand desk. And for woodworking, you could use a small workbench or a portable table saw.

That's a great idea. I've also been thinking about adding some 3D printing equipment to my apartment. I love technology and I want to be able to make my own prototypes at home. I've been taking care of my aging parents and I need a space where I can work and relax.

3D printing can be a great way to create prototypes and models. For 3D printing equipment, you might want to consider using a desktop 3D printer or a 3D printing pen. And for taking care of your parents, you could use a caregiving app or a home monitoring system.

I've been thinking about getting a home monitoring system. I've heard they can be really helpful for keeping track of my parents' health and safety. I've got a meeting with a potential investor for my startup on March 20th and I want to make sure I'm as prepared as possible.

A home monitoring system can be a great way to keep track of your parents' health and safety. Make sure to research and compare different options before making a decision. And don't forget to prepare for your meeting - you could practice your pitch and anticipate any questions the investor might have.

Yeah, I've been practicing my pitch and I feel pretty confident. I've also been thinking about getting a new laptop for my startup. I've heard that the new MacBook Air is really great for entrepreneurs.

The MacBook Air can be a great option for entrepreneurs. It's lightweight and portable, and it has a lot of great features for productivity and creativity. You could also consider using a cloud-based storage system to keep your files and data organized.

That's a great idea. I've been using Google Drive to store my files and it's been really helpful. I've also been thinking about getting a new camera for my startup. I want to be able to take high-quality photos and videos for our marketing materials.

A good camera can be a great investment for a startup. You could consider using a DSLR camera or a mirrorless camera. And don't forget to edit your photos and videos using a photo editing software or a video editing app.
